top_audit_challenges.challenge: Why is FY24-25 spend so much higher than prior years?
top_audit_challenges.defence: Programme expansion: ASS scaled from pilot to n=11,241+, 7D-DCP entered framework-build phase. Labour and non-labour both grew with documented scope expansion; 92% claim completeness, 25/25 IP-linked.

top_audit_challenges.challenge: Show contemporaneous records — not retrospective reconstruction.
top_audit_challenges.defence: 282 artefact hashes registered. 25 R&D claims with IP linkage. 13 claims corroborated by chat evidence. GitHub commit history, CloudWatch logs, Supabase migrations, and MAAT transaction ledger provide cross-source corroboration.

Director R&D labour at canonical $500/hr; allocations reconciled via v_rdti_labour_actual and v_rdti_timesheet_timelog_reconcile_fy2425. Hours bound to programme codes 7D-DCP and ASS only for FY24-25.

Hypotheses recorded prior to experiments (chat + GitHub timestamps), outcomes unknown at start (n=11,241+ research design), systematic investigation documented in RD matrix with 25/25 entries linked to IP.

next_actions_before_internal_target: Confirm 8 pending ASS cost items (lift coverage 28% → 70%+).
Bind remaining 12 chat-evidence-only claims to GitHub commit or transaction.
Produce adviser-ready PDF pack from evidence register.
Brief Andrew Douglas (Hales Redden) on defence narrative.
path_to_REAL: First adviser or auditor session against this Command Centre = REAL.
